calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-18-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-21-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Ruth Elin Auerbach, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Laura Zarco Olson, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Joel Morales, individually and as Trustees of JMM Trust.
Default entered against defendant on August 27, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, April 21, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Laura Zarco Olson, and against the Defaulted Defendant Joel Morales, individually and as Trustee of the JMM Trust as follows:

Damages/Principal - $25,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $12,075.52.
Attorney's Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $369.00, for a total of $40,269.25.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
